summary: Completed backend API regression + frontend integration smoke for auth, session creation, bulk upload, async jobs, grading (gemini/local), submissions, manual review, analytics, and export.

minor.issue: Score distribution binning uses '< end' for all buckets, so exact score 100 is excluded from histogram counts.
Temporary XLSX file created with delete=False is never cleaned up; repeated exports can accumulate temp files on server.

action_items: Fix analytics distribution logic to include score=100 in final bucket.
Add temp export file cleanup after FileResponse lifecycle (or use in-memory/streaming export).
critical_code_review_comments: grading_engine._grade_with_local_model contains hardcoded defaults for OLLAMA_URL/LOCAL_MODEL_NAME; prefer fail-fast env usage to avoid silent misrouting in non-local deployments.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test instructors/sessions/submissions via public API during pytest and Playwright runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public endpoint is healthy. Core workflows pass. Re-test analytics distribution with a known 100-score submission and verify export temp-file lifecycle after fix.
rca of the issue: Analytics bug RCA: distribution uses fixed bins [0..100] and count condition start <= s < end in all loops; this omits exact 100. Mitigation: make last bucket inclusive (<=100) or extend bins to 101. Export temp-file RCA: NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) returns persistent file and code returns FileResponse without cleanup hook. Mitigation: schedule unlink after response completion/background task.
